posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Check out what’s new in the past few weeks!

API

  • API version switch
    • Maintenance = 2024-04
    • Current = 2024-07
    • Release candidate = 2024-10
  • New marketplace_app_discounts object
  • New mutations to grant and delete marketplace discounts
  • New descriptive JSON parse error

Apps

  • Marketplace app discounts improvements
  • Integration templates renamed to integration for sentence builder
